---
title: "Week 8 Fri 03/28/2025"
format: 
  html:
    embed-resources: true
---

```{r}
#| message: false

library(tidyverse)

library(janitor)

library(palmerpenguins)
```

## Box Plots in Base R and `{ggplot2}`

**Example 1.** Create a box plot of penguins' body mass in Base R and `{ggplot2}`.

_Base R._

```{r}

```

_`{ggplot2}`_

```{r}

```

**Example 2.** Repeat Example 1, but a box per species.

_Base R._

```{r}

```

_`{ggplot2}`_

```{r}

```

```{r}
```

```{r}
```

### Box plots with points

```{r}
```

```{r}

```

### Box plots with multiple groups

**Example 2.** Create penguins' body mass by species and by gender.

```{r}

```
